description_long: This is a charming Craftsman-style bungalow with a prominent gable roof and a covered front porch supported by white columns. The exterior is clad in light blue horizontal siding with white trim, and the roof is finished with gray shingles. Decorative window awnings and detailed trim accentuate the windows, which are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides. The front porch features a set of stairs leading up to the main entrance, and the house sits elevated above ground level. The roof includes a central chimney and small dormer windows, adding to the architectural interest. The overall appearance is inviting and well-maintained, suitable for a residential neighborhood.
description: A light blue Craftsman bungalow with a gable roof, white trim, and a covered front porch. Symmetrical windows and detailed trim enhance its classic residential appeal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, central stairs, main entrance, and symmetrical front windows with decorative trim.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the gable end, three side windows with awnings, and the extension of the porch roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain gable wall with three symmetrically placed windows and no porch.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the gable end, three side windows with awnings, and the porch extending from the front.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with evenly spaced side windows
